title: Worked Example - Pointer Arithmetic with Array

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate the use of pointer arithmetic to access and modify the elements of an array. The pointer points to the first element of the array, and we use **pointer indexing** to directly access and modify the array elements.

---

**When executed, the code will show:**

```java
Before change: 10 20 30 40 50
After change: 10 20 100 40 50
```
